description: Preflight the DIG URL artifacts a given flow + usecase needs under DIG_URL_ROOT before a submit — e.g. models/pretrained, models/<usecase>, datasets/<usecase>/raw, datasets/pcb/assets (Day 1 real-photo alignment) — and report any that are missing so setup workflows can be submitted first.
rules: read-only: runs 'osmo data list' on each required URL; downloads nothing
FLOW is 0|day0 / 1|day1 / finetune; USECASE is pcb|metal_surface|glass|<custom>; VARIANT real-alignment adds datasets/pcb/assets for Day 1 PCBA
DIG_URL_ROOT has NO silent default in this skill — elicit it from the user; the core's s3://osmo-workflows/dig fallback is only a placeholder
USE_PRETRAINED_CHECKPOINT (default true) gates models/<usecase>; USE_USD2ROI_DAY1 is equivalent to VARIANT=real-alignment
run before every submit; on a missing artifact, submit the relevant setup/setup_<case>.yaml + setup/setup_pretrained.yaml first — never download assets locally to work around it
usage: Set FLOW and USECASE (plus optional VARIANT, DIG_URL_ROOT, USE_PRETRAINED_CHECKPOINT, USE_USD2ROI_DAY1). preflight_urls writes the per-flow checklist + verdict to urls_report.txt under record_store; the JSON line reports verified true/false. Requires the osmo CLI; offline it records that and passes (verified=false).
limitation: Authoritative verification requires the osmo CLI and OSMO storage reachability for 'osmo data list'; offline / no-osmo runs degrade to a non-authoritative report of the required artifact set. The artifacts themselves are populated by setup workflows that run remotely on OSMO.
